title: cynoxylon ferrugineum
intro: Cynoxylon ferrugineum, also known as ironwood, is a type of plant native to Australia that belongs to the family Rhamnaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Cynoxylon ferrugineum include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and supporting immune function. Cynoxylon ferrugineum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
